title: stelis delasotae
intro: Stelis delasotae, also known as the orchid tree, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Stelis delasotae include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Stelis delasotae can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
